channel.title: TRMD — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on TRMD (Torm plc) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED TRMD (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q4 2025 · 15.2% of portfolio. More Torm shipping.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED TRMD (+12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q3 2025 · 14.8% of portfolio. Building Torm shipping.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)

item.title: Howard Marks: ADDED TRMD (+6%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q2 2025 · 13.2% of portfolio. Building Torm shipping.

item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) added TRMD in Q4 2024 · 13.0% of portfolio. Building Torm shipping.

item.title: Howard Marks: NEW POSITION TRMD · Q1 2024
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) new position TRMD in Q1 2024 · 10.0% of portfolio. First Torm shipping position.
